---
title: "Home"
format: html
jupyter: python3
---

---
title: "Dr. Sonali Sharma"
subtitle: "Geospatial Analyst | Remote Sensing | Urban Forest Analytics"
---

I turn raw spatial data into decisions — individual trees from point
clouds, carbon stocks from allometric equations, urban growth from
satellite time series. Seven years of international research across India, Germany,
and Finland have given me hands-on experience spanning LiDAR processing,
high-resolution land cover mapping, machine learning, ecosystem service
modelling, and reproducible geospatial workflows at city and regional scale.

I am open to **GIS consultancy, remote sensing, environmental planning,
and research roles** — and always interested in collaborative projects
where spatial analysis can drive decision-making and real-world impact.

[📧 ssonalipduoh@gmail.com](mailto:ssonalipduoh@gmail.com) &nbsp;·&nbsp;
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sonali-sharma-50220210b/) &nbsp;·&nbsp;
[Download CV](cv/SonaliSharma_CV.pdf)

---

## Projects

### 🌳 LiDAR and Urban Forest Analytics

*Helsinki open LiDAR · Python · rasterio · laspy · scikit-image*

Fully automated pipelines from raw `.laz` point cloud to individual
tree inventories, carbon stock maps, and GeoAI accuracy assessments.
Built on open Helsinki City LiDAR data; every step is reproducible.

| Notebook | Description | Methods |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| [Urban tree detection](https://github.com/sonalispatial18/lidar-portfolio/blob/main/notebooks/01_lidar_tree_detection.ipynb) | Automated individual tree inventory from raw LiDAR | CHM, watershed, prominence filter |
| [AGB and carbon mapping](https://github.com/sonalispatial18/lidar-portfolio/blob/main/notebooks/04_agb_carbon_mapping.ipynb) | Wall-to-wall carbon stock map | Repola allometrics, IPCC Tier-1 |
| [GeoAI vs LiDAR urban](https://github.com/sonalispatial18/lidar-portfolio/blob/main/notebooks/02_Urban_geoai_vs_lidar_validation.ipynb) | Deep learning height model validation, urban site | SSL model, R2, residual maps |
| [GeoAI vs LiDAR forest](https://github.com/sonalispatial18/lidar-portfolio/blob/main/notebooks/03_Forest_geoai_vs_lidar_validation.ipynb) | Same validation for forested site | Bias analysis, spatial error |
---

### 🗺️ Land Use / Land Cover and Urban Growth

*ArcGIS · QGIS · Google Earth Engine · Python · R*

Multi-temporal LULC mapping and urban growth scenario modelling across
cities in the Western Himalaya — integrating climate, land cover, and
remote sensing datasets to understand how cities expand and what they
displace.

Published in *Land* (2022) and *Ecological Indicators* (2022).

*Notebooks and maps coming soon*

---

### 🌿 Ecosystem Services Mapping

*GEE · Python · R · ArcGIS*

Spatial quantification of soil erosion, flood regulation, urban heat
mitigation, and carbon sequestration across urban gradients. Delivered
as geospatial model outputs and planning-ready map products in
collaboration with municipal and research partners.

Published in *City and Environment Interactions* (2020) and
*Energy, Ecology and Environment* (2020).

*Notebooks and maps coming soon*

---

### 🤖 Machine Learning for Urban Green Spaces

*Transfer learning · Python · aerial imagery · Helsinki*

Applied transfer learning to characterise private urban green spaces
from high-resolution aerial imagery — distinguishing managed gardens,
overgrown plots, and semi-natural patches at city scale. Conducted at
the University of Helsinki in collaboration with Stockholm University.

Under review in *Urban Forestry and Urban Greening*.

*Code releasing on paper acceptance*

---

## Background

| | |
|---|---|
| **Postdoctoral researcher** | University of Helsinki, Finland · 2023–2025 |
| **Visiting researcher** | Martin-Luther-University, Germany · 2020–2021 · DAAD Fellow |
| **PhD researcher** | Jawaharlal Nehru University, India · 2018–2023 |
| **Publications** | 6 peer-reviewed · 2 under review · 1 in preparation |

**Toolkit:** QGIS · ArcGIS Pro · Google Earth Engine · Python · R ·
LiDAR · HPC (SLURM) · `rasterio` · `geopandas` · `scikit-image` ·
`laspy` · GeoAI · transfer learning

**Domain expertise:** Urban forest ecology · Carbon accounting ·
Ecosystem services · Biodiversity and green infrastructure ·
Urban growth modelling · Nature-based solutions

---

## Let's work together

If you are working on something at the intersection of cities,
nature, and spatial data — I would love to hear about it.

[📧 ssonalipduoh@gmail.com](mailto:ssonalipduoh@gmail.com) &nbsp;·&nbsp;
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sonali-sharma-50220210b/)

*This portfolio is actively growing — new projects added regularly.*
